pkgmetadata.longdescription: GluonCV Python PackageGluonCV httpsgluon-cv.mxnet.io_ provides implementations of the state-of-the-art (SOTA) deep learning models in computer vision.It is designed for engineers, researchers, and students to fast prototype products and research ideas based on these models.Installation------------To install, use.. code-block bash pip install gluoncv mxnet1.6.0 --upgrade for installing gluoncv with all dependencies pip install gluoncv[full] mxnet1.6.0 --upgradeTo enable different hardware supports such as GPUs, check out mxnet variants httpspypi.orgprojectmxnet_.For example, you can install cuda-11.0 supported mxnet alongside gluoncv.. code-block bash pip install gluoncv mxnet-cu1101.6.0 --upgrade
